hero.description: Hum spaces ko aise design karte hain ki unme rehne ka mann kare. Ghar ho, cafe ho ya koi bhi jagah — har project mein woh feeling aani chahiye jo aapne socha tha.

services.label: What we do
services.description: Design sirf dikhne ke liye nahi hota — usme rehna padta hai, kaam karna padta hai, feel karna padta hai. Isliye hum har project ko ek fresh perspective se dekhte hain.

items.title: Residential Design
items.description: Ghar banaana sirf walls aur roof nahi hota — woh aapki zindagi ka reflection hota hai. Hum har room ko samajh ke design karte hain, aapki family ke hisaab se. Vastu se leke ventilation tak, sab ka dhyan rakhte hain.

items.title: Commercial Spaces
items.description: Cafe ho, office ho ya showroom — aapki jagah aisi honi chahiye ki log baar baar aana chahein. Hum functionality aur aesthetics dono ka balance rakhte hain taaki aapka business grow kare.

items.title: Interior Design
items.description: Andar se ghar ko alive karna humara kaam hai. Furniture, lighting, materials, colors — sab milke ek story bolte hain. Hum ensure karte hain ki woh story aapki ho.

items.title: Consultation & Planning
items.description: Koi bhi project shuru karne se pehle samajhna zaroori hai — kya chahiye, budget kitna hai, timeline kya hogi. Hum pehle sunnte hain, phir clear roadmap dete hain.

items.name: Gagandeep Singh
items.content: One of the best Architecture firm in Haridwar, quality experience and dedication toward the work is key factor of this firm. Must try it.

items.name: Nitish Bhardwaj
items.content: Best person in nature, great knowledge of designing. I have designed my shop from this firm — best experience I have ever received.

items.name: Neeraj Rajput
items.content: One of the best firm with good attitude and work experience. Must try it.

items.name: Saumya Gupta
items.content: He is very professional in his work and quality is up to date.

items.name: Deepak Sharma
items.content: His work and design is very good and very super friendly person.

social.label: Follow our journey
social.description: Design process se leke final reveal tak — sab kuch share karte hain. Follow karein aur dekho kaise ek idea ghar ban jaata hai.
